'''鈭歯-j-b-zh''' ('''kanajbezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quack|quack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quack|quack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-j-b-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kanajbezhoko
|}
